reviews.comment:
Hermosa estacion de servicio, muy buena sombra. Lo lamentable el joven que  atiende la cafetería,  no solo que no tenia café,  si no que tenia muy mal genio. Una pena.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful service station, very nice shade. Unfortunately, the young man who works at the café not only didn't have coffee, but he was also very grumpy. A real shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTMlp2WmNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es un buen lugar, sus empleados se cuidan en esta época de pandemia, y hacen cuidarse al viajero, Excelente

(Translated by Google)
It is a good place, its employees take care of themselves in this time of pandemic, and they make the traveler take care of themselves, Excellent

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.comment:
No tuve una buena experiencia.  Quizás fue eventual, había varios autos esperando y un único playero atendiendo, y como no soy socio del ACA, decidí cambiar de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
I didn't have a good experience. Perhaps it was just a fluke; there were several cars waiting and only one attendant, and since I'm not an ACA member, I decided to switch to another YPF station.
